title: Bridge Camp Mirror-Read Log — Possible Error
description: The bridge camp's handwritten signal log, maintained on a cardboard panel near the northern railing, records three mirror transmissions received from the Algiers direction between 3:15 PM and 4:30 PM. The third entry is annotated with a question mark and the note 'bearing wrong? — checked twice.' If the array was 22 degrees off during this window, the third transmission may have been misread, misattributed, or missed entirely.
